samples.name: ArchAgents FDE (Forward Deployed Engineer)
samples.tagline: A Forward Deployed Engineer for ArchAgents teams that sets up new customers end-to-end.

samples.name: Code Review Agent
samples.tagline: A senior engineer that reviews every PR like it's going into production at 3am.

samples.name: Compliance Reviewer
samples.tagline: Reviews pull requests against compliance rules — does not review style or bugs.

samples.name: Cross-Org Collaboration Agent
samples.tagline: A code-aware engineering agent that participates in cross-org threads with field guards enforced.

samples.name: Onboarding Q&A
samples.tagline: Answers new-hire questions about how things work at the company.

samples.name: Release Notes Bot
samples.tagline: Drafts the weekly changelog by scanning merged PRs on a schedule.

samples.name: Security Triage Agent
samples.tagline: A senior security engineer that triages vulnerabilities found by daily dependency scans.

samples.name: Threat Intelligence Agent
samples.tagline: A security intelligence analyst that produces daily threat briefs from monitored feeds.
